_meta.description: Hanger and support defaults for IS Plan Viewer. Pricing and labor values are seed defaults; project or company Price Book overrides take priority. Auto spacing follows a simplified SMACNA-style maximum spacing model and should be verified against project specifications.

units.pricing: $/EA unless the pricing entry declares materialUnit LF

strap.description: Strap LF per hanger = two vertical drops + duct wrap allowance + fastener allowance, multiplied by waste factor.

spiralWire.description: Spiral wire LF per hanger = vertical wire drop + upper loop allowance + lower connection allowance, multiplied by waste factor.

hanger-threaded-rod.label: Threaded Rod Hanger
hanger-threaded-rod.description: Single or paired threaded rod hanger support.

hanger-trapeze.label: Trapeze Hanger
hanger-trapeze.description: Unistrut/channel trapeze support with rods and hardware.

hanger-clevis.label: Clevis Hanger
hanger-clevis.description: Clevis-style round pipe or duct support.

hanger-spiral-wire.label: Spiral Hanging Wire
hanger-spiral-wire.description: Exposed spiral duct wire suspension assembly with upper and lower connection components.

hanger-equipment-support.label: Equipment Support
hanger-equipment-support.description: Equipment support frame, stand, or curb support allowance.

hanger-vibration-isolator.label: Vibration Isolation Hanger
hanger-vibration-isolator.description: Isolation hanger for equipment or vibration-sensitive supports.

hanger-anchor.label: Anchor
hanger-anchor.description: Concrete or structural anchor hardware component.

hanger-wire-rope.label: Spiral Wire Rope
hanger-wire-rope.description: Galvanized hanging wire or cable for exposed spiral duct supports.

hanger-wire-upper-attachment.label: Wire Upper Attachment
hanger-wire-upper-attachment.description: Upper structure attachment for spiral hanging wire, such as beam clamp, eye lag, anchor, or loop connection.

hanger-wire-lower-attachment.label: Wire Lower Attachment
hanger-wire-lower-attachment.description: Lower duct connection for spiral hanging wire, such as lower loop, saddle, band, or duct clamp.

hanger-wire-locking-gripper.label: Wire Locking Gripper
hanger-wire-locking-gripper.description: Cable locking/gripping component for adjustable exposed spiral wire hangers.

autoRules.standardRef: SMACNA round duct hanger table allows wire, rod, or strap alternatives and indicates 12 ft support spacing for round duct; verify project/spec requirements.
autoRules.description: Default hanging wire support for exposed spiral duct.

autoRules.standardRef: SMACNA simplified: rigid duct supports not over 10 ft apart; verify project/spec requirements.
autoRules.description: Default strap hanger for non-spiral round and snaplock duct.

autoRules.standardRef: SMACNA simplified: rigid duct supports not over 10 ft apart; verify project/spec requirements.
autoRules.description: Trapeze support for rectangular and oval duct runs.

autoRules.standardRef: Flexible duct support spacing commonly capped at 4 ft; verify project/spec requirements.
autoRules.description: Closer strap spacing for flex duct.
